name: @aily-project/lib-sparkfun-hyperdisplay-kwh018st01
author: SparkFun
description: SparkFun 1.8 寸 KWH018ST01 TFT 彩屏 Blockly 库，支持初始化、清屏、背光、像素、线条、矩形、填充和文本。

description_en: Blockly wrapper for SparkFun KWH018ST01 1.8 inch TFT display.
